reason: KARMMA is idecabtagene vicleucel (ide-cel) BCMA CAR-T for multiple myeloma (plasma-cell neoplasm), not B-cell lymphoma; wrong CAR-T target and wrong disease for a B-cell-lymphoma review.
CARTITUDE-4 is ciltacabtagene autoleucel (cilta-cel) BCMA CAR-T for relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, not B-cell lymphoma.
KARMMA-3 is ide-cel BCMA CAR-T for 3L+ multiple myeloma per the group field itself; multiple myeloma is plasma-cell, not B-cell lymphoma.
Sutimlimab is an anti-C1s complement inhibitor approved for cold agglutinin disease (CAD); CADENZA is the CAD pivotal trial — not an ITP agent or trial (group field even self-flags '(related)').

COMPETE compares Lu-DOTATOC vs everolimus in neuroendocrine tumors (NET); 177Lu-DOTATOC is a somatostatin-receptor radioligand, not a prostate-targeted (e.g. PSMA) radioligand — wrong tumor type and wrong receptor target for a prostate radioligand review.
CLEAR-OUTCOMES tested bempedoic acid (ATP-citrate lyase inhibitor), not a PCSK9 inhibitor; wrong drug class for a PCSK9 NMA.
HALT-IT tested tranexamic acid in acute gastrointestinal hemorrhage, not a noncardiac surgery population; right drug, wrong clinical context (medical bleeding, not perioperative).
LUTONIX-AV (NCT01710033) randomized DCB vs POBA in dialysis arteriovenous access stenosis, not peripheral arterial disease/femoropopliteal PAD; wrong vascular bed.

EPIC-HR enrolled symptomatic non-hospitalized high-risk COVID-19 outpatients within 5 days of symptom onset; it is the registrational outpatient nirmatrelvir-ritonavir trial, not a hospitalized-treatment trial.

Atrasentan is a small-molecule selective endothelin-A receptor antagonist, not a biologic; ALIGN may belong to an IgAN-targeted review but not a 'biologics' review (the same trial appears correctly in IGAN_TARGETED_BROAD).
MAJESTIC evaluated the Eluvia drug-eluting stent (DES), not a drug-coated balloon (DCB); wrong device class for a DCB NMA.
FAME-3 compared FFR-guided PCI with current-generation DES vs CABG in three-vessel coronary disease, explicitly excluding left main; wrong anatomic population for a left-main-only review.
The ACT trial (NCT01200654) evaluated acetylcysteine for contrast-induced AKI prevention at coronary/peripheral angiography, not for postoperative AKI in surgical patients; wrong clinical context.

Name 'QuANTUM-First' with NCT02039726 is internally inconsistent — NCT02039726 is the QuANTUM-R trial of quizartinib monotherapy in R/R FLT3-ITD AML; QuANTUM-First (frontline quizartinib+chemo) is NCT02668653 (which is correctly used at id=1002).
IDHENTIFY (enasidenib R/R IDH2-mutant AML) is NCT02577406, which is correctly used at id=1106; NCT03839771 does not correspond to IDHENTIFY.

NCT02168946 is TANGO-1 (meropenem-vaborbactam in cUTI), correctly used at id=1212; TANGO-II (meropenem-vaborbactam in CRE infections including HAP/VAP) is NCT02168133, so the NCT here is mismatched to the labeled trial.
NCT02418585 is TRANSFORM-2 (the positive 4-wk MADRS esketamine TRD trial, correctly used at id=1019); TRANSFORM-1 is NCT02417064 — name/NCT mismatch within the same dataset.

Esketamine is an NMDA-receptor antagonist (dissociative anesthetic), not a classical serotonergic psychedelic; including it in a psychedelic NMA alongside MDMA/psilocybin trials is a class mismatch unless the review explicitly broadens the definition.
QUAZAR AML-001 tested oral azacitidine (CC-486) maintenance in AML CR1; it is neither a venetoclax-based regimen nor an FLT3-targeted therapy, so it falls outside the stated VEN/FLT3 scope.
NCT02437279 corresponds to OpACIN-neo (Rozeman/Blank, neoadjuvant ipi+nivo melanoma); the name 'OPTIMUS-1' does not match this NCT or any commonly published neoadjuvant melanoma trial acronym.
TROPiCS-02 tested sacituzumab govitecan, a Trop-2-directed ADC, not a HER2-directed ADC; the trial includes a HER2-low cohort but the agent itself is not a HER2 ADC.
Tanezumab is administered subcutaneously (anti-NGF systemic mAb), not intra-articularly; including tanezumab in an intra-articular knee-OA NMA is a route-of-administration mismatch.
